---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this address? Who does it help?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature in detail. Include UI mockups or API designs if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought of.

## Additional Context

Any other context, links, or references.
